name: Maybank Statement
description: Extract all transactions from a Maybank PDF bank statement.
gemini_prompt: You are a financial document parser. Extract ALL transaction rows from this bank statement. Return ONLY a valid JSON array with no other text. Each item must have: date (DD/MM/YYYY string), description (string), debit (number or null), credit (number or null), balance (number). Do not truncate or omit any rows.
